titleStmt.title: SII 34.185: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 185. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the Chōḷēśvara shrine in front of the Harāḷakēśvari temple on the hill.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Kulōttuṅga III, 20th year, Vṛiśchika, badi 8, Monday, Pūrva-Pūrva-Phālgunī = A.D. 1198, November 23, Monday.

Gift of an amount of 8 āṉai-achchu otherwise called paḻañjalākai-achchu for offerings to the image of Āriya-Nāyaṉār. The donor was a merchant of Sivapādasēkarapuram, called Nāvalūr-uḍaiyāṉ Kāḷi Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyāṉ alias Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-uṟandairāyan.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉa cakkaravattikaḷ Īḻamumaturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ karuvūruṅkoṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulOttuṅka cOḻatEvaṟkku yāṇṭu [2 10]vatu miṟuścika nāyaṟṟu Apara
pakṣattu Aṣṭamiyum tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūrattu nāḷ Irājakempīra vaḷa nāṭṭu kuṟunaka nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumāṇikkamalai Uṭaiyār kōyil kāṇi Uṭaiya civappi
rāmaṇaril kācapaṉ Apaiyam pukkāṉ kāḷiyāṉa cūrya tēvapaṭṭar kaviciyan pe yāva pocivāci rō naṉāṉa Eḻunūṟṟu paṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi Āḷavantāṉāna tirucciṟṟampala paṭṭanum kācapaṉ kiḻavan peru
māḷāṉa poṟkōyil paṭṭaṉum Ivaṉ tampi kampanṉāna māṇikka nāyaka paṭṭanum kaviciyaṉ Uṭaiyāṉ ciṅkaṉṉāna Ālālacuntara paṭṭanum Ivan tampi perumāḷāṉa ceyaṅkoṇṭacōḻapaṭṭaṉum kavici
yan mātēvapaṭṭaṉāṉa pallava dakṣiṇāmūrttipaṭṭanum kācapanmarutan nampiyāna tiruvāḷappōkki paṭṭaṉum Ivan bha ma Āḻvāṉum kācapan periyāṉ māṇikkaṉāṉa Āṭaviṭaṅka paṭṭaṉum Ivvaṉaivōm
Iṉṉāṭṭu civapātacēkarapurattu viyāpāri nāvalūr Uṭaiyāṉ kāḷi tirucciṟṟam palamuṭaiyāṉāṉa kulōttuṅkacōḻa Uṟantairāyan pakkal Upaiyaṅkoṇṭu kal veṭṭi kuṭutta paricāvatu
Ivar mutaliyār Āriyanāyaṉārkku Amutu paṭikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku Āticcateṉṉāl Irunāḻi Ariciyum palakkaṟi Amutum Ittāl vanta Uppum miḷakum neyyamutum muppattu
Iraṇṭu vaṭṭamum tiruvamutākki Amutu ceyta cēṣam kumpiṭa Ēṟiṉa māhēśvara peṟuvārkaḷākavum tiruvāṭkkā ttal tapaṅ kāṭṭak kaṭavōmākavum
Ivapakkal Upayaṅkoṇṭa Āṉaiaccu pañca calākai Accu 8 Ivaccu Eṭṭuṅkoṇṭu Ikkōyil Uṭaimai ceyvāṉ Iyāvaṉ cantirā
tittyaval Ivvupaiya celuttak kaṭavōmāka Ivū Uṟantaiyarāyar pakkal Iv Accu Eṭṭu Upaiyaṅkoṭu kalveṭṭik kuṭuttōm Ivvaṉaivōm Ivar
kaḷ paṇiyāl Ikkōyil kkaṇakku marutūr
Uṭaiyār centāmaraikka nakara kaṅkātaran Eḻu
Digital edition of SII 34.185 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
